ground_truth.title: 2025 Best of Year Award Winners - Interior Design
ground_truth.main_content:
Explore Interior Design’s 2025 Best of Year Award Winners

Interior Design’s 20th annual Best of Year Awards continued its proud tradition of recognizing standout projects and products across the design industry, with winners revealed by Editor-in-Chief Cindy Allen during an unforgettable ceremony in Manhattan December 11. See who took home top honors, including the special Best of the Best award, recognizing the most iconic products and projects of the past two decades.

2025 Best of Year Awards Winners and Honorees

Project

Apartment
Winner: Boa Viagem Apartment - Architects Office
Honorees:
Sete Apartment - Studio Arthur Casas
Central Park Apartment - SheltonMindel
Digital Aesthetics Apartment - UR Bureau
Jessica Helfand House - WXY Architecture + Urban Design

Bar/Social Club
Winner: Manifest - INC Architecture & Design
Honorees:
Orchid Room, Pier Sixty Six - Jeffrey Beers International
Clemente Bar - Allied Works and L’Observatoire International
KI Culinary Club - NC Design & Architecture Limited
Mimi, Olia & Va!, Citizen on Jasper - Ste Marie
Mancave - Zinc Studio

Beach House
Winner: Oaxaca Residence - Meyer Davis
Honorees:
Lulla House - I IN
Florida Home - Jonathan Adler
Hale Mau’u - Walker Warner and Catherine Kwong Design
Ocean Views - Workshop/APD

Beauty/Spa
Winner: Carappo Toranomon Hills - Tanseisha Co.
Honorees:
Keen Tachikawa - Log.Design
Whispering Tree Spa - LW Design
Zenova Spa & Wellness, Pier Sixty Six - Jeffrey Beers International

Best of the Best: Apartment
Winner: Sky House - Ghislaine Viñas and David Hotson

Best of the Best: Beach House
Winner: Wainscott Residence - Bates Masi + Architects and David Kleinberg

Best of the Best: Building Facade
Winner: Nelson Atkins Museum of Art - Steven Holl Architects

Best of the Best: City House
Winner: House on the Park - Superkül + Pencil Design

Best of the Best: Commercial Amenity Space
Winner: The Prow - Aidlin Darling Design

Best of the Best: Commercial Development
Winner: One Vanderbilt - Kohn Pedersen Fox

Best of the Best: Designer’s Own Home
Winner: Long Island Waterside Retreat - SheltonMindel and Reed A. Morrison Architect

Best of the Best: Education
Winner: Roberts Pavilion, Claremont McKenna College - John Friedman Alice Kimm Architects

Best of the Best: Entertainment
Winner: Wuhan Wushang Mall International Cinema - One Plus Partnership

Best of the Best: Environmental Impact
Winner: Citi Wealth Hub - Ministry of Design
